full_steam_ahead.ponder.steam_engine.tex: The engine body is a 2-block tall cylinder, with one of its faces being the Steam Inlet.
Above an empty stroke space, place a Shaft to start the engine.
A boiler provides steam through the Boiler Outlet.
Fluid Pipes carry the steam from the outlet to the engine's Steam Inlet.
full_steam_ahead.ponder.steam_engine_ban: The multiblock steam engine can be both single or multiple, sharing a wall between them, forming an engine block.
Place another cylinder beside it and they will merge into one shared wall.
